_researchNotes: Bark.com new-lead alert, sparse variant. Subject 'New customer looking for your services' is one of the generic alert subjects a seller quoted first-hand (iamryanwright.com/blog/bark-lead-generation-service). Bark request forms let customers skip questions, and reviews note many Bark leads lack budget/details ('leads tend to provide limited project details... many lacking budget information' — sidehustles.com Bark review), so this fixture has only event type and a vague date ('I'm not sure yet' is a standard Bark form option). UK-flavoured location since Bark is a UK company (footer address: Bark.com Global Limited, London). Customer name is first name + last initial only; phone/email withheld pre-purchase. Text-only variant to exercise the textBody path.
subject: New customer looking for your services
textBody:
Hi Demo DJ Co,

New customer for you on Bark.

Jordan P.
Birmingham, West Midlands

DJs

What type of event is it?
Birthday party

When is the event?
I'm not sure yet

Respond to Jordan for 5 credits.

View this lead: https://www.bark.com/sellers/leads/990221/

--
Bark.com Global Limited, 85 Great Portland Street, London, W1W 7LT
